calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-15-2019 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-18-2019 Continued To Mar-06-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiff Stonestown Shopping Center, L.P.S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment And Prove-Up Hearing; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declarations Of Darren Iverson And Jeffrey N. Brown
Off Calendar Jan-29-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant SLSL Corporation, a California corporation doing business as Mrs. Fields Cookies.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Kacey R. Riccomini, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Stonestown Shopping Center, L.P., a Delaware limited partnership.
No appearance by defaulted defendant SLSL Corporation, a California corporation doing business as Mrs. Fields Cookies.
Plaintiff's complaint for breach of the lease agreement was filed on September 5, 2018, and personally served on defendant's Agent of Process on September 7, 2018.
Default as to defendant SLSL Corporation, a California corporation doing business as Mrs. Fields Cookies, was entered on October 10, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on October 23, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Stonestown Shopping Center, L.P., a Delaware limited partnership, and against the defaulted defendant, SLSL Corporation, a California corporation doing business as Mrs. Fields Cookies, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $582,747.71.
Attorney Fees & Costs - $10,000.00.
Total - $592,747.71.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
